name: Worried Fried Green Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 lb Green tomatoes, sliced vertically 1/4 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Shake tomato slices in a paper sack with salt, pepper, and flour.
2. Heat oil over medium-high heat in a black iron skillet.
3. Add tomatoes and garlic to the hot oil.
4. Cook without stirring for about 5 minutes.
5. Using a stiff spatula, scrape the bottom of the skillet and turn the tomato slices.
6. Continue cooking over medium to high heat, occasionally scraping the bottom of the skillet to prevent burning. Aim for darkened tomatoes in direct contact with the skillet; expect some sticking.
7. If necessary, add more oil sparingly.
8. Lower the heat to low when most of the tomatoes have turned olive green or dark brown, approximately 20 minutes.
9. Cook the remaining tomatoes around gently with the spatula until they are all either brown or olive green.
